name: TRANSIENT SYNOVITIS OF HIP
definition: OBSERVATION HIP = TRANSITORY SYNOVITIS = TOXIC SYNOVITIS = COXITIS nonspecific inflammatory reaction

demographics.Etiology: unknown; no organism on joint aspiration

distribution: fluid in anterior recess between capsule + femoral neck
discriminating_features: lateral displacement of gluteal line (least sensitive + least reliable)

general: lateral displacement of gluteal line (least sensitive + least reliable)
US: fluid in anterior recess between capsule + femoral neck
MR: intense enhancement of hypertrophied synovium (DDx: septic arthritis)
NUC: normal / slight increase in activity → excluding osteomyelitis + avascular necrosis

clinical.Prognosis: complete recovery within a few weeks
